title: Distyl — Architecting the AI-Native Enterprise
heroSubhead: Distyl partners with the most ambitious enterprises to design and operationalize their AI transformations. We do this by forward-deploying our teams of engineers and researchers who own the outcome, and deploying our purpose-built products that are customized to the business.
heroText:
Architecting the
AI-Native Enterprise

Distyl partners with the most ambitious enterprises to design and operationalize their AI transformations. We do this by forward-deploying our teams of engineers and researchers who own the outcome, and deploying our purpose-built products that are customized to the business.

paletteNotes: Warm off-white/cream base (#F7F2E8), hero slightly darker cream (#EDE6DA), footer dark navy (#1B2837). No white backgrounds. Black text on light backgrounds, white on dark footer. First button color is a dark navy rgb(19,40,63).

body.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"

fontNotes: H1 uses Tiempos Headline (editorial serif). Body/paragraphs use Plain (geometric sans). 72px H1 at desktop. Strong editorial serif/sans pairing.

sections.className: relative w-full overflow-hidden flex items-stretch px-[32px] py-[96px]
sections.gist: Hero section. H1 + subhead paragraph. Canvas element (1000x1000) present — custom animated hero graphic.
sections.fullText:
Architecting the
AI-Native Enterprise

Distyl partners with the most ambitious enterprises to design and operationalize their AI transformations. We do this by forward-deploying our teams of engineers and researchers who own the outcome, and deploying our purpose-built products that are customized to the business.

sections.gist: Manifesto/philosophy paragraph: 'Every real-economy business will become an AI business, much like many of the winners of the last two decades were built from the ground up as internet businesses.'
Social proof stats section. '150M+ end users reached by our AI systems. Trusted by Fortune 500s. Measurable outcomes in weeks. Bottom-line impact in months, not years.'
Mobile version of case studies / stats section.
Desktop version of case studies / outcomes section. Distyl delivers production AI systems in weeks or months across complex operating environments.
Press/media logos section. WORLD ECONOMIC FORUM x2, THE INFORMATION. '$1.8B Valuation' mention.
Blog posts feed. 6 posts: Engineering, Frontier, Research categories. SEE ALL POSTS CTA.
Newsletter signup. 'NEWSLETTER / Signals from the frontier / SUBSCRIBE'

statsSection.headline: AI outcomes, proven in production
statsSection.subhead: Distyl delivers production AI systems in weeks or months across some of the world's most complex operating environments.

stats.label: end users reached by our AI systems
stats.note: Powering some of the largest agentic AI deployments to date.

stats.label: Trusted by Fortune 500s
stats.note: Partnering with the leaders across telecom, healthcare, manufacturing, insurance, and retail.

stats.label: Measurable outcomes in weeks
stats.note: Bottom-line impact in months, not years.
